basic_details.job_title: IIITDM Kancheepuram Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Kancheepuram
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Kancheepuram (IIITDM Kancheepuram) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 22 June 2026 on the official website of the Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Kancheepuram (https://www.iiitdm.ac.in). A total of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancy has been announced through the IIITDM Kancheepuram Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per GoI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent, Electrical Engineering or equivalent (Desirable: M.Tech in similar fields)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent / Electrical Engineering or equivalent (Desirable: M.Tech in similar fields).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIITDM Kancheepuram to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Kancheepuram Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIITDM Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIITDM Kancheepuram Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIITDM Kancheepuram to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Kancheepuram Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIITDM Kancheepuram JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIITDM Kancheepuram is 12th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent, or Electrical Engineering or equivalent. A Master's degree (M.Tech) in similar fields is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in the IIITDM Kancheepuram recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment at IIITDM Kancheepuram will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIITDM Kancheepuram located?
faq.answer: IIITDM Kancheepuram is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600127.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website of IIITDM Kancheepuram on or before the last date. The application link will be available in the 'Important Links' section.
